assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryIdentityResources with at least IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile()
assertions.rationale: Lines 9-13 call AddInMemoryIdentityResources with IdentityResources.OpenId() and IdentityResources.Profile().

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddInMemoryApiScopes with a scope named 'weatherapi'
assertions.rationale: Lines 14-17 call AddInMemoryApiScopes with ApiScope("weatherapi", "Weather API").

assertions.assertion: Program.cs defines a client with AllowedGrantTypes set to Code (authorization code with PKCE)
The client configuration includes RedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://webapp.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
assertions.rationale: Line 25 sets RedirectUris correctly and line 26 sets PostLogoutRedirectUris correctly.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs has the correct middleware pipeline ordering: UseIdentityServer after UseRouting and before UseAuthorization
assertions.rationale: Lines 33-35 show UseRouting → UseIdentityServer → UseAuthorization in the correct order.
